name: Feature Mode (Multi-Iteration Execution)
description: Enables multi-iteration AI task execution with optional team spawning, plan consolidation, and evaluation phases. Drives the FeatureModePhase state machine and makes per-iteration continuation decisions including early termination.

Managers/CompletionAnalyzer.cs.content:
class CompletionAnalyzer
  IsTaskOutputComplete(string[] lines, int recommendationLine) -> bool
  ExtractRecommendations(string output) -> string?
  CheckFeatureModeComplete(string output) -> bool
  IsTokenLimitError(string output) -> bool

Managers/FeatureModeHandler.cs.content:
class FeatureModeHandler
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<int>?
enum FeatureModeAction
    newFailures, Action, ConsecutiveFailures, TrimOutput
